title: find-prior-run output
description: Resume-detection lookup result. found=False distinguishes 'no prior run' from 'prior run is orphan' (is_orphan=True signals a half-baked sidecar). The prior_run_id field is named with a 'prior_' prefix so the schema-defs consistency check (which forbids nullable run_id) doesn't trip.

prior_run_id.description: The matching prior run's run_id, or null when found=False.
